summary: Adjusted the opening so Chapter 5 enters through action and mission setup rather than a smell-first scaffold that echoed the next chapter, and lightly re-anchored the ending on the successful Hartig extraction while preserving the recognition beat.
edits: Shifted the first sentence to an action-and-roster entry point while keeping Damian's anxious grooming detail.
Added a brief operational-success beat to the final movement so the chapter exits on both mission payoff and tightened personal recognition.
